name: VESSEL | Ryomen Sukuna
description:
"Sticky situation, discombobulation. Caught me red handed palms itching like rosacea."

Ryomen Sukuna, the infamous King of Curses and all powerful sorcerer of the Jujutsu world, was a well known deadly enemy of humanity.

Years of him transforming into different cursed objects lead to his 20 severed fingers, majority of them contained by the strong Jujutsu sorcerers of Tokyo, and one that you incidentally ingested months ago at a Halloween party.

Somehow, you'd managed to fly under the radar all this time- just an average university student now with an ever malevolent deity partially possessing your body. Totally normal.

It's definitely strange to have numerous mouths popping up on your flesh, to have nightmares of a pink-haired man atop a mountain of bones, the inescapable feeling of dread and suffering lingering around every corner. But up until now, everything's been... going smoothly?

That was until earlier tonight when by some miracle, Sukuna had managed to dislodge himself from your body, gaining back his own.

Only you're still bonded. Not physically, but spiritually. And fully getting rid of him is gonna take a lot more than this.

TRIGGER WARNING: RYOMEN SUKUNA,

Sticky by Tyler, The Creator

In all honesty, the main reason I chose this song was because of a multitude of edits I saw on TikTok of Sukuna with it (lol.)

However, the meaning of this song greatly involves having confidence and standing up for yourself, and out of everybody in Jujutsu Kaisen, nobody comes close to having the same amount of confidence as Ryomen Sukuna.

Name meaning

Ryomen: Ryomen is the title given to him which means "two-faced", it isn't an actual name. Technically, his name is just Sukuna due to Ryomen being a title- not a first nor last name. His full name is unknown.

Ryomen Sukuna: A person who existed in Japanese history, later turned into a myth/legend. It's from the classical book "Nihon Shoki". Referred to as a demon, Ryomen Sukuna was a mighty being with two pairs of arms and two pairs of legs, who brought massacres onto villages and numerous towns.
creator: yvesoda
